name: Decompose LayerStructure
description: Exposes each node in a LayerStructure as a named output. Top-level layers use their name; sublayers of a named parent use 'parentname_index'. Outputs are path tuples usable as CT_Subdivide_Layer 'path' or CT_LayerAgent 'layer'.

outputParameters.name: layer
outputParameters.description: Path tuple for the first layer (replaced dynamically based on structure).
